name: model-bench-lab
description: AI 模型能力测试合集 — 不同模型生成的 3D 场景对比

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n portal,claude48,gpt-weather,doubao-wgpu,gpt-webgpu,gpt-skill,fable-ocean,gemini-ocean,gpt-ocean,grok-ocean,antigravity,fable-kart,gemini-kart,gpt-kart,gsap-three,sonnet-storm,tank3d,sonnet-tank3d -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green,cyan,blue,red,white,cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red,magenta,cyan,yellow,green "vite --port 3000" "vite --port 3001 claudeopus4.8-ocean-webgpu" "vite --port 3002 gpt5.5-ocean-weather" "vite --port 3003 doubao2.1-ocean-webgpu" "vite --port 3013 gpt5.5-ocean-webgpu" "vite --port 3004 gpt5.5-ocean-skill" "vite --port 3005 claudefable5-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3006 geminiflash3.5-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3007 gpt5.5-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3008 grok4.3-ocean-realistic" "vite --port 3012 antigravity-ocean-storm" "vite --port 3009 claudefable5-kart-circuit" "vite --port 3010 geminiflash3.5-kart-circuit" "vite --port 3011 gpt5.5-kart-circuit" "vite --port 3014 claudeopus4.8-gsapthreetest" "vite --port 3015 claudesonnet5-ocean-storm" "vite --port 3016 gpt5.5-tank3D" "vite --port 3017 claudesonnet5-tank3D"
